prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 暨南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第59名，近年排名稳定在50–60区间，属中上水平综合类 大学；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及宿舍楼安装安检设备等校园管理事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度评价为较热（总排名第41位），短视频曝光量 中等偏上，报考关注度温和；未见历史投档断档记录；新闻传播学A、工商管理A、应用经济学A-、中国语言文学A-、生物学A-、药学A-，共6个A-/A/A+学科，在 经管、新闻、生物医药领域实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学推荐，与该校招生专业（人 工智能、物联网工程、光电信息科学与工程、临床医学等）高度契合，相关专业热度对报考有正向拉动。陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年（约172468人）增加约19 .7%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争，但扩招效应更为显著。；暨南大学位于广东广州，属一线城市，对陕西考生有一定跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约17129名、2026年大幅扩招约38.6%（计划44→61人）带来的竞争缓解效应、陕西省物理类 考生增加约19.7%带来的竞争加剧效应，以及学校声誉平稳、专业热度偏正向等因素，净效应为位次数字明显增大（更易录取）。预测2026年物理类最低位次约21199名，区间2069 9–21699名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 20170 → 11396 → 11185 → 11261 → 17129. The ranking was higher in 2021, stabilized around 11,000–11,000 from 2022 to 2024, and shifted to about 17129 in 2025 due to Shaanxi's first implementation of the new college entrance exam (Physics Category), with a cumulative shift of about 5900 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 17129. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi's Physics Category (including Science) was: 22 in 2021, 33 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 36 in 2024, 44 in 2025, and 61 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). In 2026, there is a significant expansion of about 17 students (+38.6%) compared to 2025, which is expected to notably reduce admission competition and push the minimum ranking number higher.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; it ranks approximately 59th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years, placing it as an upper-middle-level comprehensive university. Its reputation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as installing security inspection equipment in dormitories, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity is rated as relatively hot (41st overall), with moderate to high short video exposure and moderate application attention. No historical admission gaps have been recorded. It has 6 A-/A/A+ disciplines: Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, and Pharmacy A-, showing strong strength in economics, management, journalism, and biomedicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly recommended, as are Clinical Medicine and Stomatology. These align well with the university's offered majors (Artificial Intelligence, Internet of Things Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, etc.), and the popularity of related majors positively drives applications. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 2025 (about 172,468), intensifying overall competition, but the expansion effect is more significant. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city, which has some cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 17129, the significant expansion of about 38.6% in 2026 (plan from 44 to 61) easing competition, the increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, and factors such as stable university reputation and generally positive major popularity, the net effect is a notable increase in ranking number (easier admission). The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 21199, with a range of 20699–21699.

If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (<20699), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is near the lower limit (>21699), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1424 → 2043 → 1783 → 2941 → 4062. Overall, there is a fluctuating downward trend, with 2024 shifting back by about 1158 places compared to 2023, and 2025 (first year of new Gaokao for History Category) shifting back by about 1121 places compared to 2024, accumulating a total shift of about 2279 places over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4062. The university's enrollment plan for History Category (including Liberal Arts) in Shaanxi Province: 17 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 18 in 2025, and 28 in 2026 (according to enrollment plan documents). In 2026, there is a significant expansion of about 10 places (+55.6%) compared to 2025, which is a very large increase, expected to significantly reduce the intensity of admission competition and drive the minimum ranking number to increase noticeably.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 59th, with recent rankings stable in the 50–60 range, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive university. Its disciplines include Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, and Chinese Language and Literature A-, which highly match the History Category admission majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Finance, Accounting, Advertising, Law, etc.), and the disciplinary strength has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as installing security inspection equipment in dormitories, with no major negative public opinion. The Douyin popularity evaluation is relatively hot (overall ranking 41st), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level. No historical admission gaps or breaks have been recorded.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is divided with wait-and-see but has clear advantages for civil service exams; Chinese Language/Literature is recommended (popular for civil service and public institution exams); Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged (needs attention); Accounting/Finance/Auditing is recommended; Finance/Economics is divided with wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Shaanxi Province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% compared to 2025 (about 75,641), with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying overall competition, but the expansion effect (+55.6%) far exceeds the candidate increase. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city, which has strong cross-provincial appeal to liberal arts candidates in Shaanxi. Considering the baseline ranking of about 4062 in 2025, the significant competition relief effect from the 2026 expansion of about 55.6% (plan 18→28), the competition intensification effect from the increase of about 17.0% in History Category candidates in Shaanxi Province, as well as factors such as stable university reputation, high matching degree of advantageous disciplines, and divided major popularity, the net effect is a noticeable increase in the ranking number (easier admission). The predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 5466, with a range of 4916–5916.
